name: Olive Garden Florentine Lasagna
recipeIngredient: Marinara sauce or tomato-cream sauce, as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam spinach until tender. Press out excess moisture and chop coarsely.
2. Chop mushrooms and onions over medium-high heat until onions are tender. Drain excess liquid and cool.
3. In a large bowl, mix ricotta cheese, 2/3 cup Parmesan, egg, salt, pepper, basil, and oregano.
4. Add the cooled spinach and mushroom-onion mixture to the bowl and mix on low speed until just blended.
5. Cook lasagna according to package directions. Rinse under cool water and drain thoroughly.
6. Place four lasagna strips in the bottom of a lightly oiled 9x13-inch pan, overlapping slightly.
7. Top with 1 cup of spinach filling.
8. Sprinkle with 1-1/2 cups shredded cheese and 1/3 cup Parmesan. Repeat layering two more times.
9. Top with remaining four lasagna strips.
10. Spread 1 cup of marinara or tomato-cream sauce over the top.
11. Cover tightly with foil and preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
12. Bake, covered, for 1 hour. Remove from oven and keep warm at least 30 minutes before cutting.
13. Top with extra Parmesan cheese. (Can be refrigerated a day in advance of baking if desired.)
